overall.description: First-person exploration of the Slytherin common room from a Harry Potter video game (Hogwarts Legacy). The player character walks through a stone corridor into a grand gothic common room featuring a fireplace, Christmas decorations, an indoor pool, and large underwater windows showing the lake outside. The environment features cool blue-green tones with warm artificial lighting from lamps and the fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with wall-mounted lanterns

events.description: exits narrow corridor through stone archway into the main common room

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit stone corridor toward the archway entrance of the common room

entered.detail: rough grey stone blocks forming the corridor walls
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm yellow light
dark fabric wall hanging with decorative patterns
thick cylindrical stone pillar with carved details
gothic stone arch marking the entrance to the main chamber
large stone fireplace with burning fire visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with rough grey walls illuminated by warm wall-mounted lanterns. A decorative tapestry hangs on the right wall. The player walks forward through the corridor, passing stone columns, and approaches a gothic archway that reveals the grand fireplace of the common room beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with pool and Christmas decorations

events.description: discovers indoor pool with lily pads and spiral staircase
approaches decorated Christmas tree in the center of the room

agents.ego_description: walking around the common room, turning to examine the pool area, bulletin board, and central fireplace

notable_agents.action: student standing near the back wall by the fireplace

entered.detail: circular pool of water with floating lily pads and stone border
wooden spiral staircase ascending to an upper level
wooden notice board covered with papers and a wreath
tall standing lamp with fringed shade casting warm light
large green fern in a stone planter
decorated evergreen tree with ornaments and lights
dark brown leather couch with wooden frame
wooden table with tea set and books

segments.scene_description: The player enters the spacious gothic common room with high ceilings and stone pillars. The camera turns to reveal an indoor pool with lily pads and a spiral staircase, then moves past a bulletin board and floor lamp toward a decorated Christmas tree. The grand fireplace remains visible in the background while a student stands near the back wall. The space features a mix of warm firelight and cool ambient tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room window area with underwater lake views

events.description: moves from central fireplace area to the large underwater windows
large shadow of underwater creature passes by the window

agents.ego_description: approaching the tall windows and looking up at the underwater view of the lake outside

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair reading a book

entered.detail: tall gothic windows with grid-patterned glass showing underwater view
blue-tinted view of the lake outside with light filtering through water
tufted green velvet couch against the wall
dark wood cabinet with glass doors containing a skeleton display

segments.scene_description: The player moves toward the far wall featuring massive arched windows that look out into the underwater lake, casting a cool blue light across the stone floor. A student sits reading in an armchair near a green velvet sofa and a wooden cabinet displaying a skeleton. The camera tilts upward to follow the towering windows as a large shadow of a creature swims past outside, then pans to show more of the gothic architecture and furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, dimly lit stone corridor into the expansive, atmospheric grandeur of the Slytherin common room. It begins by moving through a narrow hallway of rough grey walls and warm lanterns, passing a decorative tapestry before gliding through a gothic archway. As the camera enters the spacious room, the view expands to reveal high ceilings and stone pillars, shifting past an indoor pool with lily pads and a decorated Christmas tree toward the glow of a grand fireplace. The scene then transitions toward the far wall, where the warm interior light gives way to a cool blue radiance emanating from massive arched windows looking into an underwater lake. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the towering architecture as the shadow of a creature swims past the glass, panning across green velvet furniture and gothic furnishings.
